_comment: B-37 — Allow-list of TruNorth company slugs that legitimately hold (or are corporate parents of holders of) ATF Federal Firearms Licenses. Curated 2026-06-06. Anything not in this allow-list and not passing the strict CIK/SIC guardrail in atf-merge.mjs will land in the manual review queue (public/data/_meta/atf-review-queue.json) rather than being attached to the brand.

_format.rationale: <one line: why this brand legitimately holds FFLs>
_format.match_terms: <extra business-name search terms used by the matcher>

walmart.rationale: Largest U.S. firearms retailer by store count; FFL Type 01 dealers in many stores.

dick-s-sporting-goods.rationale: Dick's Sporting Goods + Field & Stream — FFL counters in selected locations.

cabela-s-bass-pro.rationale: Cabela's + Bass Pro merger; both legacy chains operate FFL dealer counters in nearly every store.

bass-pro-shops.rationale: Bass Pro Shops — major sporting-goods chain with FFL Type 01 dealers.

academy-sports.rationale: Academy Sports + Outdoors — large Southern sporting-goods chain, FFL Type 01.

rural-king.rationale: Rural-supply chain with FFL counters in most stores.

l-l-bean.rationale: L.L.Bean Hunting & Fishing division; FFL dealer at the Freeport, ME flagship.

orvis.rationale: Orvis hunting/fly-fishing flagship operates FFL dealer counters.

sportsmans-warehouse.rationale: Sportsman's Warehouse — every store has an FFL dealer counter.

dunham-s-sports.rationale: Dunham's Sports — Midwest sporting-goods chain with FFL dealer counters.

smith-and-wesson-brands.rationale: Smith & Wesson — flagship U.S. handgun manufacturer.

sturm-ruger-and-co.rationale: Sturm, Ruger & Co. — large publicly-traded firearms manufacturer.

browning-arms-company.rationale: Browning Arms — long-running firearms manufacturer (Herstal Group subsidiary).

colt-s-manufacturing-company.rationale: Colt's Manufacturing — historic U.S. firearms maker.

winchester-repeating-arms-company.rationale: Winchester Repeating Arms — long-rifle manufacturer (Olin/Browning subsidiary).

sig-sauer-inc.rationale: SIG SAUER — handgun and rifle manufacturer.

federal-cartridge.rationale: Federal Cartridge — ammunition manufacturer (Vista Outdoor subsidiary).

byrna-technologies.rationale: Byrna Technologies — less-lethal launchers, holds Type 07 FFLs.

olin-corporation.rationale: Olin — Winchester Ammunition parent, large ammo manufacturer.

lockheed-martin.rationale: Lockheed Martin — defense prime; holds Type 10 destructive-device FFLs.

boeing.rationale: Boeing Defense — holds Type 10/Type 11 destructive-device licenses.

bae-systems-inc.rationale: BAE Systems U.S. — defense manufacturer; destructive-device FFLs.

leidos.rationale: Leidos — defense contractor with destructive-device FFL holdings.

saic.rationale: Science Applications International — defense contractor with destructive-device FFLs.

am-general.rationale: AM General — Humvee maker; destructive-device FFLs for military variants.

bell-textron.rationale: Bell Textron — military rotorcraft, destructive-device FFL holdings.

md-helicopters.rationale: MD Helicopters — armed military rotorcraft, destructive-device FFL.

aerovironment.rationale: AeroVironment — military UAV maker; destructive-device FFL.

_review_required_drop_list._comment: Slugs currently carrying firearms_atf_ffl in production that ARE NOT in the allow-list and DO NOT have a credible firearms-industry tie. The new merger will refuse to attach FFL records to these; any apparent match lands in the review queue. Listed here so reviewers can confirm the scrub when ingestion next runs.
